entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws the contents of the specified surface onto this canvas at the given point, using the specified sampling options.

params.sampling: The sampling options that control how pixels are filtered when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw with default settings.
params.surface: The surface whose contents are drawn.
params.p: The point at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed.

entries.signature: public void DrawSurface (SkiaSharp.SKSurface surface, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

fields.summary: Draws the contents of the specified surface onto this canvas at the given coordinates, using the specified sampling options.

params.x: The x-coordinate at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed.
params.sampling: The sampling options that control how pixels are filtered when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw with default settings.
params.surface: The surface whose contents are drawn.
params.y: The y-coordinate at which the top-left corner of the surface is placed.
